title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, X Drake, Unknown person #14, Luffy, Drake as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you plotting? Are you Wor- King alone? Are you with an organi- Zation?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Who the hell are you, you bastard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Sorry to disappoint you,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But even if you kill me, I'm not saying shit!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the end... Nothing I say can justify this

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You sure about that...? Everybody acts tough until they have a taste of torture with me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Mua- Hahahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That bastard!!!

dialogue.speaker: X Drake
dialogue.text: Go after X Drake!! He's an enemy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What I should do...where can I run to!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Kaboom!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: should I go back to the Marines...? No, I still have a job-to do here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: All hope...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: IS*NOT LOST!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: move out of my sight...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Juk!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: "CALIBUR"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: "KONG Gun"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: "If it's hope I need...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He's one of the flying SIX!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's drake!!! Why did he do that to the giant!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Strawhat Luffy"!!!, I have my reasons, but I am a come force here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please allow me to fight along- side you!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 24 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
